title: Churn reduction PRD built on correlation evidence, not causation

inputs.prompt: Write a PRD for a churn reduction initiative targeting users who have not used the collaboration feature in 30 days. The evidence is a correlation: users who actively use collaboration churn at 4% annually vs. 22% for non-users. There is no experiment establishing causation, and an alternative explanation (power users self-select into collaboration and would retain regardless) has not been ruled out.
